description_long: This is a modern, circular sofa with a low, continuous backrest that curves smoothly around the seating area, creating an inviting and enclosed feel. The sofa is upholstered in a light beige fabric, giving it a soft and neutral appearance suitable for urban parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor lounges. The seat is a single, thick, round cushion, while the back is adorned with five loose cushions—three larger, textured gray ones and two smaller, smooth beige ones—arranged for both comfort and visual interest. The armrests are integrated into the backrest, rising gently from the sides and featuring a cut-out detail near the base for a contemporary touch. The base is solid and cylindrical, with no visible legs, contributing to a stable and grounded look. The overall design is plush and inviting, ideal for communal seating in public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A round, beige sofa with a continuous curved backrest and integrated armrests, featuring five loose cushions in gray and beige. The design is plush, modern, and inviting, with a solid cylindrical base and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular seat, three large gray back cushions, and two smaller beige cushions arranged for comfort.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the integrated armrest and the cut-out detail at the sofa's base, with cushions visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, curved backrest and the tops of the back cushions, with the cut-out details on both sides of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the armrest and cut-out, with a clear view of the cushion arrangement from a different perspective.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose cushions: three large gray back cushions and two smaller beige seat cushions, all arranged in a semi-circular cluster along the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, continuous with the backrest, medium height, gently curving upward from the seat with a modern cut-out detail near the base, fully upholstered.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa sits on a solid, cylindrical base that extends to the floor, giving a grounded and stable appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height, curved backrest that wraps around the seat, providing support and enclosure, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid beige upholstery on the main structure and seat, with the back cushions featuring a subtle textured or woven gray fabric; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
